name: @metorial/mailbluster
description: Manage email marketing leads, products, and e-commerce orders in MailBluster. Create, read, update, and delete leads (subscribers) with custom fields, tags, and subscription status. Manage custom fields for campaign personalization. Create and manage products for e-commerce tracking. Create and manage orders linked to products and campaigns for revenue attribution. Note: the API does not send emails directly; it manages lead and e-commerce data used by MailBluster's email campaign system.
